note.zh: 在 Qoder 中由 Qwen3.7-Max 一次生成，本页为未经修改的原始产出。基于 Three.js 的体素世界：区块地形、第一人称 WASD 控制、方块破坏/放置，并自带奇幻建筑（法师塔、远古神庙、巨树、龙巢、符文阵）。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Qwen3.7-Max inside Qoder; unmodified original output. A Three.js voxel world: chunked terrain, first-person WASD controls, block break/place, with fantasy structures (wizard tower, ancient temple, giant tree, dragon nest, runic circle).

note.zh: 在 Qoder 中由 Qwen3.7-Max 一次生成，本页为未经修改的原始 SVG。海边场景：太阳、云朵、海鸥、远处群山与帆船、椰子树，一只鹈鹕骑着红色自行车（含速度线），左上角附一张鹈鹕侧面图鉴小卡。
note.en: Generated in one shot by Qwen3.7-Max inside Qoder; unmodified original SVG. A seaside scene — sun, clouds, gulls, distant mountains and a sailboat, a palm tree, and a pelican riding a red bicycle (with motion lines), plus a pelican side-profile study card in the top-left corner.

note.zh: Qwen3.7-Max(Qoder · Default)用仓库标准中文提示词一次生成的圈地智能体,未经人工修改。按案例规则策略文件不公开、仅注册运行,由维护者亲自执行,任何 bug 均不修复。自命名「圈地虎」。诊断:API 合规却几乎不圈地——两个种子圈地均为 0 格、得分冻在出生点的 9(9:1220、9:1113)。名字叫圈地虎,实战却从未扩张。
note.en: One-shot Turf War agent by Qwen3.7-Max (Qoder, Default) from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt, no human edits. Per case rules the policy file is unpublished and no bug is ever fixed; this registers the maintainer-executed run. Self-named "圈地虎" (Land-grab Tiger). Diagnosis: API-compliant but barely captures — 0 captures on both seeds, score frozen at the 9-cell spawn (9:1220, 9:1113). Named the land-grab tiger yet never expands in play.
